metadata.audit_policy: organized v6.1 timing/damage decisions, raw workbook grouped rows/resources, existing user-supplied Mornye DEF scaling preserved

post_v61_resource_corrections.reason: The organized v6.1 data omitted source-backed repeat counts when aggregating Resonance Energy and Concerto Energy. Damage repeat counts were already applied. These resource totals were corrected from the raw source component structure.

lynae_off_tune_source.mapping_rule: Sum S for distinct components; multiply only rows with explicit maximum repeat count; choose one mutually exclusive mode/timing variant; constellation damage variants retain the same action-row Off-Tune value.
